Chari3

Multi-Vendor E-Commerce Platform

Project Overview

Chari3 is a comprehensive multi-vendor e-commerce platform built with modern web technologies. It supports multiple user roles including buyers, sellers, suppliers, and logistics providers.

Technology Stack

Next.js 16
React 19
TypeScript
Tailwind CSS
Prisma ORM
NextAuth.js
SQLite
Bun

Features

  • Multi-vendor marketplace
  • User roles & permissions
  • Product management
  • Order processing
  • Logistics tracking
  • Review & ratings

Local Development

This project requires a local SQLite database and NextAuth configuration.

# Clone the repository

git clone https://github.com/bengharbios/Chari3.git

# Install dependencies

bun install

# Initialize database

bun run db:push

# Start development server

bun run dev

View on GitHub

Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Prisma & NextAuth
